email_subject: Application for Content Marketeer – Baver Ok
email_body:
Dear Stan Janssen,

I am writing to apply for the Content Marketeer position at Cology Group. As a junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in content creation, SEO, and social media, I am excited about the opportunity to grow within your team and contribute to the content of both clients and Cology Digital.

In my current role at Episto, I write keyword-targeted blog content, manage WordPress sites, and track performance using analytics tools. I also built mirook.com from scratch, handling design, content, and technical SEO. I am comfortable with copywriting, design tools like Canva, and social media integration. I am eager to learn, open to feedback, and ready to take responsibility for creative projects.

I would love to discuss how my skills can support your team. Thank you for considering my application.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Stan Janssen,

I am excited to apply for the Content Marketeer role at Cology Group. As a junior digital marketer with a strong foundation in content creation, SEO, and social media, I am eager to bring my creativity and drive to your team and grow alongside experienced professionals.

Currently, at Episto, I write SEO-optimized blog content, manage WordPress sites using Elementor, and track performance with tools like Google Analytics and SEMrush. I also built mirook.com, a multi-page WordPress site for a youth chess champion, where I handled everything from design and content to technical SEO and social media integration. This project taught me to balance creativity with deadlines and to produce content that is both visually appealing and effective.

I am particularly drawn to this role because of the variety it offers—working across different clients and content types. I am comfortable with copywriting, design (Canva), and social media, and I am always looking to learn new tools and trends. I am not afraid to ask for feedback and am committed to delivering high-quality work.

I would love the chance to contribute to Cology Digital's creative output and help build content that resonates. Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
cv_highlights:
- Wrote keyword-targeted blog content and managed on-page SEO for client websites at Episto
- Built and maintained WordPress sites using Elementor and Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Designed and built mirook.com from scratch: full site structure, content, social media integration, and technical SEO
- Proficient in copywriting, Canva, and social media content integration
- Tracked content performance with Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, and Ahrefs
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in content creation, social media, and SEO. At Episto, I write keyword-targeted blog content, manage WordPress sites, and track performance. On my own project mirook.com, I handled design, content, and social media integration. Comfortable with copywriting, design tools, and digital trends; eager to learn and grow in a creative team. Based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch A2 in progress.

CORE SKILLS
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Social: social media content & integration
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

References available on request.
